---
# REQUIRED FIELDS
title: Guidelines for reporting research using systematic coding of observed human
  behaviour (SCOBe)
acronym: ''
description: |-
  Reporting of systematic coding of observed human behaviour (SCOBe) research.

  [SCOBe checklist (Word)](https://www.equator-network.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/SCOBe-checklist.docx)  [SCOBe checklist (PDF)](https://www.equator-network.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/SCOBe-checklist.pdf)
rg-doi: ''
pmid-id: ''
pmid-url: ''
relevant-urls: '[Read the full-text](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11135-024-01969-9)
  of this guideline.'
full-bibliographic-reference: Hillen MA, Hoeben EM, Kok R, McHale C, Sexton MM, van
  der Asdonk S, van de Bongardt D, Bowman B, Brown R, Branje S, Chorney J, Donker
  MH, Ejbye-Ernst P, Geeraerts S, Van der Giessen D, Humphris G, Larsen H, Philpot
  R, Portell M, Yuan S, van der Veen C, Noordman J. Guidelines for reporting research
  using systematic coding of observed human behaviour (SCOBe). Qual Quant. 2024.


# OPTIONAL FIELDS
rg-language: English
explanation-and-elaboration-papers: ''
guideline-history: ''
relevant-more: ''
website-url: ''
additional-languages: ''
additional-information: ''
relevant-editorials: ''
primary-guideline: ''
other: ''
other-relevant-research: ''


# LIST FIELDS
study-design:
# - Animal pre-clinical research
# - Artificial intelligence/Machine learning studies
# - Clinical practice guidelines
# - Clinical trials
# - Diagnostic and prognostic studies
# - Economic evaluations
# - Experimental studies
# - Letters to the editor/Correspondence
# - Mixed methods studies
- Observational studies
# - Other
# - Patent landscapes
# - Qualitative research
# - Quality improvement studies
# - Reliability and agreement studies
# - Study protocols
# - Systematic reviews/Meta-analyses/Reviews/HTA/Overviews
# - No study design specified
clinical-specialty:
# - Allergy
# - Anaesthesia
# - Audiovestibular medicine
# - Behavioural medicine
# - Cardiovascular medicine
# - Complementary and alternative medicine
# - Dentistry
# - Dermatology
# - Emergency medicine
# - Gastroenterology
# - Genetics
# - Haematology
# - Health informatics
# - Hepatology
# - Infectious diseases
# - Medical education
# - Neurology
# - Nuclear medicine
# - Nutrition and dietetics
# - Obstetrics and gynaecology
# - Occupational therapy
# - Oncology
# - Ophthalmology
# - Paediatrics
# - Palliative care
# - Pathology
# - Pharmaceutical medicine
# - Physiotherapy
# - Primary care
# - Psychiatry
# - Psychology
# - Public health
# - Radiology
# - Rehabilitation medicine
# - Renal medicine
# - Respiratory medicine
# - Rheumatology
# - Sport and exercise medicine
# - Surgery
# - Toxicology
# - Tropical medicine
# - Urology
- No clinical specialty specified
report-section:
# - Abstract
# - Acknowledgements
# - Appendix
# - Biospecimen/bioresource information
# - Conference paper/abstract
# - Conflict of interest
- Data
# - Ethical issues (consent etc.)
# - Figures/Graphs
# - Funding
# - Harms/adverse effects/safety data
# - Images
# - Intervention (exposure)
# - Narrative sections (discussion etc.)
# - Outcomes (variables)
- Procedure/Method
# - Protocol-whole report
# - Research recommendations
# - Results
# - Statistical analysis plan-whole report
# - Statistical methods and analyses
# - Study characteristics (participants etc.)
# - Terminology/definitions
# - Title
# - Whole report
# - No report section specified
keyword:
- behavior
- behavioral coding
- behaviour
- behavioural coding
- code
- codes
- coding
- coding behaviour
- data
- observation
- observational
- observed human behaviour
- SCOBe

---

{{< include ../_template.qmd >}}
